_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Colony-forming assay using human (02.3 NF2−/− KO3 and HEI193) and murine (MS03) NF2-deficient SC lines revealed significant growth suppression in response to 5 μM defactinib
details: Colony-forming assay revealed significant growth suppression in response to 5 μM defactinib
